===[[Pokémon GO]]=== In [[Pokémon GO]], James is a member of [[Team GO Rocket]]. From July 7 to September 30, 2020, from December 14, 2020, to February 28, 2021, and from October 1, 2021, to October 15, 2021, he can be encountered if a Meowth balloon appears in the overworld. He will battle the {{player}} immediately after [[Jessie#Pokémon GO|Jessie]] is defeated. Like with other {{tc|Team GO Rocket Grunt}}s, {{stardust}}500 and a [[Mysterious Component]] are rewarded upon defeating him. When Jessie and James are active in game, they may both Photobomb when taking [[Photography#Pokémon_GO|snapshots]] of Pokémon, this will provoke a {{p|Meowth}} or {{p|Wobbuffet}} encounter. ====Pokémon==== James uses a team of three {{OBP|Shadow Pokémon|GO}} in a {{OBP|Trainer Battle|GO}}. Green-colored cells denote the Pokémon that may be encountered during the bonus challenge. The Shadow Pokémon James leaves behind also has a chance of becoming [[Shiny Pokémon (GO)|Shiny]], as denoted by the {{shinystar/GO}} icon. =====December 14, 2020 - February 28, 2021 & October 1 - 15, 2021===== {| class=roundy style="display:inline-table; margin:2px; background:#600; border:3px solid #c00; text-align:center; width:240px" |- style="background:#ccc | colspan=3 style="{{roundytop|5px}}" | {| style="text-align:left; width:100%" |- ! {{color2|000|James#Pokémon GO|James}}
